title: Looking to hire a specialist to help our small marketing agency set up Monday
excerpt: We are a team of 3 who have just moved to Monday.com and are looking for help in best using Monday to manage multiple client projects in the simplest, most intuitive way. We need a dashboard that provides a high level ov…

posts.author: angelicakrauss (Angelica Krauss)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are a team of 3 who have just moved to Monday.com and are looking for help in best using Monday to manage multiple client projects in the simplest, most intuitive way. We need a dashboard that provides a high level overview, we need daily to-dos based on subitem due dates, and we need a way to manage our “projects” as processes with dynamic dates across 40+ tasks.

We have a substantial portion of this built out, but need someone more experienced to help us set up the connections/dynamic dates/dashboards/daily to-do items.

Thank you!

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @angelicakrauss

I would love to sit down and chat through your needs and help you optimize your Monday.com setup, automations and process.

I offer a free 30m consult to get started feel free to book some time here: Calendly - Tim Little

Best Regards

posts.author: Andrew1 (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Angelica,
What you are wanting done is right up my alley of expertise and I would be happy in helping you out on this.
You can reach me on andrewjohnson56782@gmail.com
Best Wishes,
Andrew
